name: fizzi-challenger-app
description: Fizzi Challenger Bank – Fizzi Challenger App (Angular + Node.js monorepo)

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --prefix "[{name}]" --names "server,client" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.test: npm test --prefix server && npm test --prefix client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix client
